I could do some research and get back to you, but since this is a tricky question to answer precisely, I’ll just try to describe my understanding of how the process works instead. I think the total time from the moment someone first applies to be a US citizen to the day they actually become a citizen could range from a few months up to several years, depending on what their overall experience is like. First, an immigrant applies for “Adjustment of Status” to the US government. This is their “first application”, and that takes a while. It usually takes at least six months for the government to consider and process the application, and this first round can be withdrawn at any time and the process restarted later. Depending on the circumstances of the immigrant, they can apply for “adjustment of status” repeatedly and wait again for a decision. In theory the first application can take as long as two years. In other cases, a green card can be “surrendered” for the purposes of immigration and the immigrant can then apply as a new person. The green card is still in effect for the immigrant, they just give it up temporarily in order to apply as a new person. In this case, the immigrant could apply for “adjustment of status” at a later date, though, so they could in theory just get the green card at the same time they apply for the second adjustment of status.

What I understand is that the “adjustment of status” happens before the green card.  So if someone applies for “adjustment of status” and is rejected, they don’t get a green card but they also can’t become a citizen.  If someone has a green card but never applies for “adjustment of status”, they still can’t become a citizen.  I’m not sure if they can ever apply for citizenship again after becoming a permanent resident in another country, but this is not what the general rule says.  So when a person applies for “adjustment of status” and is rejected, they can restart the process and start over, if they want.  The adjustment of status application can be revoked at any time.

And then the immigrant has to “pass the test” in order to become a US citizen.  I think this is a simple citizenship test, but I’m not sure if you need to take a separate naturalization test or if it is built into the adjustment of status

To make a messy bun, you take a small section of your hair at the front of your head and twist it into a sort of bun, held together with bobby pins.  You secure the bun with bobby pins all the way around, and then leave the rest of your hair down.  The bunches of hair sticking out from the bun are the messy part!  You can also add some loose locks of hair hanging down on the sides for an extra casual look.  I hope that helped!
How long does your hair need to be to make a messy bun?

Most women’s hair should be at least shoulder-length to be able to make a messy bun.  And you need enough hair that you can gather together a small bunch at the front and create a bun with it.  If your hair is shorter than shoulder-length, you can still wear a messy bun, but you’ll just need to gather all of your hair together and wrap it into a bun that sort of sits on top of your head.

response_0.content: What price do you think the bitcoin can reach in 20 years?

It is extremely difficult to predict the future evolution of Bitcoin, as it is a rapidly evolving and highly speculative cryptocurrency.  However, there are a few observed facts that are likely to continue driving the long-term value of bitcoin.   Bitcoins are not mined using physical resources or labor, but rather through competitive computational processes which are rapidly advancing due to increasing processing power and network sophistication.  Thus the limited supply of bitcoins is not subject to diminishing resource pressures or economic cycles, and will likely continue to exhibit strong price increases over time as computing power and network infrastructure steadily improves.  Furthermore, bitcoin is subject to minimal governmental regulatory oversight or control, and is not backed by any government, corporation, or central bank.  These factors have generated great enthusiasm and interest in the bitcoin community, and are likely to continue driving demand and appreciation for the currency going forward.  Given these factors, it is certainly possible that the price of a single bitcoin may exceed $1 million USD within the next 20 years.  However it is difficult to make more specific predictions due to the significant uncertainty and rapid evolution of the bitcoin ecosystem.

response_1.content: What price do you think the bitcoin can reach in 20 years?

It is very difficult to make specific predictions regarding the price of bitcoin, as this is highly dependent on numerous future factors including technology developments, macroeconomic changes, supply/demand dynamics, regulatory trends, and competition from other cryptocurrencies and conventional payment systems.  That said, forecasts of future cryptocurrency values are frequently discussed in the media, and there are a variety of viewpoints regarding the potential future value of bitcoin.  One common speculative projection is that bitcoin could reach a value of $500,000 or more in 20 years, based on an analysis of historical commodity price increases and considering bitcoin’s new and rapidly-expanding application scope.  However, this estimate should certainly be regarded as highly speculative, and it is more accurate to characterize such estimations as “wildly optimistic” or “highly ambitious” rather than “reliable predictions”.  In order to place this projection in perspective, it is important to note that many pragmatic analysts and observers believe that, due to the inherent volatility and uncertainty surrounding cryptocurrencies, medium to long-term investments in bitcoin and other cryptocurrency assets are essentially unwise and untenable, and should be considered purely speculative.

response_1.content: What are some benefits of cannibalism?

Cannibalism seems to make a certain kind of food into more food. That means that cannibalism reduces the total amount of resources needed for a group to stay alive. It also creates some new potential foods. So it might increase the overall nutritional value of the diet.
Are humans full of nutrients?

Some people are, and other people are not. But we’re in between these two extremes: All humans have a basic set of nutrients, but it’s a more limited set than the nutrients that any particular part of a human’s body would have. You might think of nutrients as being like the tiny building blocks of matter, so that humans have a limited set of nutrients that can be used to build more things. If a human isn’t eating the other nutrients that he or she needs, then the body will use the human’s own nutrients for fuel, so the human would “burn out” their own body, which could be bad for health. But if you get more nutrients into your body, then your body can use that for more construction.

Hmm, this is a complex question!  Although nails seem like an unnecessary evolutionary modification, they actually serve a number of important functions.  Nails are analogous to claws in animals, and help protect the hands and provide predator defense.  They are also used for gripping and manipulating objects.  In humans nails also serve a secondary sexual characteristic function, and are used for grooming and social display.  Finally, nails provide an attachment point for muscles that activate the fingers, so they are an important structural component of the hand.  Overall, nails seem to be an example of a complicated and functionally diverse evolutionary adaptation.

Saint Thomas Aquinas was an Italian monk who lived in the 1300s.  He was the leading Christian theologian of his time, and also made important contributions to natural philosophy.  He’s still one of the most influential thinkers in the western world.
what were his contributions to natural philosophy ?

Thomas introduced the idea of experimentation into natural philosophy.  Prior to him, many natural philosophers would make observations of the natural world and then speculate based on those observations, but Thomas was the first to systematically propose theories and then test them against experiments, and then propose revised theories based on the results of the experiments.  This eventually led to the establishment of the scientific method.

Thomas was a Christian, and his philosophy was influenced by both Christian doctrine, and by Aristotelian philosophy.  He believed that both reason and faith are important, and that they can coexist.  This was quite controversial at the time, since the two were considered mutually exclusive.

response_0.content: What does conservatorship mean?

A conservatorship is a legal process in which a person (the conservator) who is legally in charge of the property of someone who is unable to care for him- or herself (the conservatee) is appointed to manage that property for the benefit of the conservatee.  This is done when someone is unable to manage their property, or makes poor decisions with their property, because of mental illness, dementia, or for other reasons.
So they take over because the person can't make their own decisions?

The conservator is appointed to oversee the property of the conservatee and to manage it.  However, the conservatee is still legally in charge of the property and can make decisions regarding it.  The person in charge of the conservatorship is called the “conservator” and has legal responsibilities.  The person being managed is called the “conservatee” and has legal rights.  When you hear “conservatorship” you might think of this legal process, but you might also think of it as a way to manage a person’s financial affairs, or a professional property manager.
Thanks for the detailed explanation.

When you hear “conservatorship” you might think of this legal process, but you might also think of it as a way to manage a person’s financial affairs, or a professional property manager.

response_0.content: I need to improve my quality of sleep. How can I do this?

There are several things you can do to improve your sleep quality. You might try going to bed at a regular time each night, getting regular exercise, and avoiding caffeine, alcohol, and other stimulants before bed. Additionally, it can be helpful to avoid eating or watching too much screen time right before bed, and to get plenty of exposure to sunlight during the day to help regulate your circadian rhythm.
Why does going to bed at a regular time help?

Sleep is related to the body’s circadian rhythm, which is the “biological clock” that our body uses to keep track of time. There’s a bit of a feedback loop here, with light being sensed by the eyes and then processed by the brain to make our bodies release the hormone melatonin. Melatonin is our body’s “nighttime hormone” that helps us feel drowsy and ready for sleep. This process goes faster when it is dark, which is why it is helpful to go to bed when it’s dark, even if you’re not really tired. (It’s harder to sleep when the body’s clock isn’t ready!) And going to bed at the same time every night helps your body learn the cues of when to go to bed, which in turn helps your body release more melatonin.
I see. I usually go to bed at different times of the night. I guess I could try sleeping at the same time to see if my sleep improves.

Yes, getting into a regular bedtime routine will be helpful for your sleep quality. And if you’re not already getting enough regular exercise, doing some moderate exercise daily can also help to improve your sleep, since it gives you a source of natural energy to make you feel more energized during the day.  Finally, eating a healthy, balanced diet that includes plenty of whole grains, fruits, and vegetables can also help to improve the quality of your sleep, as these foods help maintain a healthy metabolism and keep your energy levels high.

response_0.content: What was the battle of the Somme in WWI?

The battle of the Somme was one of the bloodiest battles of World War I. More than 300,000 soldiers were killed and over one million wounded or captured during the battle, which lasted five months from July to November 1916. The battle was part of the struggle to control German-controlled France, and the overall goal was to take control of the German-controlled German railway system.  The German army constructed some of the strongest and most heavily fortified positions of the war at the Somme, and German forces caused massive casualties among British, French, and Australian forces.  Eventually, the British were able to advance slowly against the German forces.

response_1.content: What was the battle of the Somme in WWI?

The Battle of the Somme took place during World War I, and is famous as one of the bloodiest battles in history. It occurred on both sides of the French-German border and lasted for several months, resulting in over a million casualties (more than any other battle in World War I). Military commanders believed the attack would be decisive, and would perhaps end the war, but about 575,000 casualties were sustained by the British and French armies, while the German forces lost about 600,000. Many of the casualties were the result of human error on the part of poorly equipped British troops, who were suffering from poor weather conditions and disorganization. The Somme also had a huge impact on civilians, who lost up to 20% of their population during the battle. The war extended over several more years, including the Battle of Verdun, which was also a very bloody battle. The Somme and Verdun were the biggest battles of the war, and exposed the horrors of modern warfare.

Well, mold is a type of fungus that can grow indoors if the humidity is right, or if there are spores in the air.  In some situations, it can be beneficial, like in your body (it’s a part of the normal healthy digestive system, but an overgrowth is called “Candida”) or in a garden (in the right place, it can be very helpful!).  But most people don’t want mold growing anywhere in their house, especially indoors, because it can make you feel sick, or lead to problems like getting sick or asthma.  Mold tends to grow in damp places, where it is more humid than normal, so if you notice that damp spots tend to stay moist longer than other areas, or if you smell a “musty” smell coming from under a floorboard or in the corners of a room, that can be a sign that it’s there.  If it’s causing an environmental health problem, you should contact a professional who can come inspect your house.
Okay but what is black mold?

Some kinds of mold are good for you, and some are dangerous, and you’re right to be concerned about what kind you might have in your house.  Black mold is a very common kind of mold, it’s black and its spores are airborne.  This mold is more of a “necrotizing” mold (from the Greek nekron meaning “dead”, and tokos meaning “damage”) than the ones that normally grow in your body.  Basically, it can make people feel sick and, if large quantities of it are growing, it can be dangerous for pets, and even cause environmental health problems for the people in the house.  It can cause some respiratory problems (especially asthma), and it can cause headaches, rashes, and even an itchy feeling in the throat, and it can make people feel “dizzy” or nauseated.  All of those symptoms can be signs of something harmful, but in many cases they go away after some time.  If you think you have mold in your house, I recommend you contact a professional who can inspect your house.

response_0.content: What are the longest living animals?

Another extremely long lived animal is the Bowhead whale, which can live up to 200 years.  The longest lived recorded vertebrate is an Aldabra giant tortoise named “Adwaita”, who lived to the ripe old age of 252.  Finally, the longest living invertebrate is the giant clam “Tridacna gigas”, which can reportedly live to 300 years.  So all in all there are a variety of long lived species, but nothing quite matches the impressive longevity record of Ming the starfish!  Hope this helps!  Cheers.

Another reason why some animals have such long lifetimes is because their populations are not disrupted by major environmental changes such as massive extinction events.  A common misperception about long lived species is that they are somehow genetically “perfect” or “well adapted”, but this is actually not true at all.  Evolutionary theory tells us that high survival rates in long lived species are actually the result of “genetic drift” due to small populations, rather than “optimal” genetic traits. Therefore, most people are very reluctant to attempt any sort of wholesale revision or re-interpretation of these texts.  The various religious beliefs regarding the text also make it problematic to attempt any kind of radical re-interpretation of the text, since this could be seen as engaging in heretical beliefs which challenge the central doctrines of the respective religious faiths.
Is there a universal religion?

Traditionally, various religions have asserted that their belief system is the "one true religious truth", and that all other beliefs and religions are false.  However, based on a general survey of religious belief systems throughout history and around the globe, it appears that no single religious system is universally adopted or accepted by all religions or cultures.  

Therefore, it is generally considered that there is no single, single "true religion", but rather there are a wide variety of religious belief systems which serve as important guides and sources of spiritual understanding and meaning in the lives of many around the globe.

response_0.content: What's the difference between nuclear fission and nuclear fusion?

Fission splits atoms, fusion combines them. 
Fission uses a highly radioactive source and releases energy, but also radioactivity. 
Fusion also releases energy, but produces little waste, as it is more controllable.
Which one does nuclear powerplants use?

Nuclear power plants use both.  A nuclear fission plant uses reactors to heat water, producing steam which turns a turbine that generates electricity.

A nuclear fusion plant is more complicated and expensive to build, so at this point only large-scale research and development are being carried out.  Fusion plants produce extremely high temperatures using tokamaks, which are giant cylindrical vessels.  Tightly focused lasers or particle beams heat up the fusion fuel (deuterium and tritium) to cause fusion.  The fuel is kept at extremely high temperatures for much longer than in fission plants.  An ITER reactor is being built by the European Union, China, India, Japan, Russia, and South Korea.

response_1.content: What's the difference between nuclear fission and nuclear fusion?

Fission splits atoms, fusion combines them. 
Fission uses a highly radioactive source and releases energy, but also radioactivity. 
Fusion also releases energy, but produces little waste, as it is more controllable.
Which one does nuclear powerplants use?

Mostly fission, but occasionally fusion.  Nuclear powerplants use controlled fission reactions, and have so far produced more energy than fusion plants.  However, fusion reactors are safer, and some advanced designs promise to match or exceed the energy yield of nuclear powerplants.

response_0.content: Can you tell me about NASA's Magnetospheric Multiscale (MMS) mission?

MMS is a NASA spacecraft designed to study the "magnetosphere,"the energetic charged particles and magnetic field around the Earth. The MMS mission aims to improve our knowledge of how space weather moves through the magnetosphere, how it interacts with the Earth and the interplanetary environment, and how this influences the radiation environment in space. MMS was launched on April 27th 2016, and the spacecraft is designed to operate at least for five years, in order to gather a wealth of data about the magnetosphere. The MMS spacecraft has three instruments, spanning a range of properties/phenomena of the magnetosphere, including complex plasma and particle dynamics, magnetic fields, and electric fields.
What is the difference between MMS and SWPC?

MMS is a NASA space mission designed to study the magnetosphere – the area of interplanetary space surrounding the Earth containing the planet's magnetic field. The Solar Wind Plasma Composition (SWPC) instrument aboard NASA's MMS spacecraft is a quadrupole mass spectrometer, a dedicated instrument designed to make detailed in-situ measurements of charged particle and dust data in the solar wind and Earth's magnetosphere.  MMS's scientific mission is multifaceted and includes studies of the plasma composition, acceleration, acceleration regions, dynamics, energy transfer and dissipation, and composition of the Earth's magnetosphere, which helps us understand and predict how our space environment  behaves and how it interacts  with cosmic radiation in interplanetary space.
How long has MMS been around?

MMS is a mission in operation since 2016. Following its launch on April 27, a series of maneuvers  placed it in orbit at its science orbit on May 29, 2016. MMS reached its final operational orbit on June 4th, fulfilling all required orbital transfer criteria and beginning its effective data collection mission.  

The design phase of MMS spanned from 2005-2010. Under the direction of NASA and key scientific and aerospace partners, MMS was developed by a multi-agency team of scientists and engineers from NASA’s Goddard Space Flight Center and its partners, the Johns Hopkins University Applied Physics Laboratory, and the Southwest Research Institute. MMS is the result of the comprehensive set of investigations that arose from NASA’s Magnetospheric Multiscale (MMS) Science and Technology Definition Team.

2 cups yogurt

2.  Now, pour this mixture in a mold or an earthen pot and leave it in the sun for a couple of hours till it cools down.
3.  Cut into pieces, take them out of the mold, and dry them in sun for a couple of hours more.
4.  Serve with papads or chutneys.

Here are some typical ingredients in a Mexican kitchen:

2 teaspoons of Garlic powder
1 teaspoon of ground cumin
2 teaspoons of chili powder
1⁄2 teaspoon of ground cayenne
3 tablespoons of Vegetable oil
1 pound of chicken breast, chopped into 1⁄2-inch cubes
1⁄2 of a small red onion, peeled and cut into 1⁄2-inch pieces
1 teaspoon of fresh minced garlic
2 tablespoons of fresh minced cilantro
1 tablespoon of fresh lime juice
Salt and Pepper to taste

Steps to make Chicken Tinga:

Heat a pan over medium heat and add the oil.  When hot, add the cubed chicken.  Cook, stirring occasionally, until browned.

Add the garlic, onions, chili powder, cumin, cayenne, and salt and pepper.  Stir well.  Let cook for 2-3 minutes until onions are soft.  Add the lime juice, and stir again.

Turn off heat.  Let cool for about 15 minutes.  Stir in cilantro and serve!

1⁄2 tsp cayenne pepper

response_0.content: What are the symptoms of panic disorder?

Panic disorder involves unexpected and repeated panic attacks (also called "panic episodes") and a fear of having another attack. These unprovoked attacks include intense fear and a feeling of intense anxiety or terror, along with a number of physical symptoms like racing heart, sweating, trembling of the hands, chest pain, shortness of breath or smothering sensations, and a feeling of choking. Panic attacks often occur "out of the blue" or build up gradually, but are usually lasting around 10 minutes, and typically can be resolved with breathing and relaxation techniques. The key symptoms of panic disorder are crushing panic attacks and the fear of future attacks, causing significant distress or impairment in functioning.
That sounds terrible. It also sounds kind of scary.

I completely agree. Panic attacks and panic disorder are serious mental health issues that can make it very difficult to function normally, and negatively impact your many areas of your daily life. Psychological and/or medical treatments can be very effective in treating panic disorder, and can help you learn to profoundly reduce your feelings of panic and anxiety by stabilizing your emotions. The first step is always to speak with a mental health provider for an evaluation and a professional diagnosis. Please reach out to a medical provider with any questions you have about panic disorder and seek professional treatment as soon as possible for the best chance at healing from these symptoms.

response_0.content: In business, what does the term "turnover" refer to?

Turnover refers to the metric of net employee churn, or the rate at which employees stop actively working for an organization, and either leave the company or become inactive, usually measured in terms of percentages. In practical terms, it refers to the number of people who quit or are terminated from their jobs within a given period of time, and is used as an indicator of the rate of attrition for employees of a given company or organization.  Turnover can be measured quarterly and annually, and for organizations can be particularly challenging when high, as it can be associated with disruptions in productivity and efficiency, increased costs, as well as loss of knowledge and skills.
Are turnovers associated most with any particular industries?

Turnover rates do vary by industry, with companies in the travel and hospitality industry, specifically, often having particularly high levels of average employee turnover, likely due to the fast-paced nature of these work environments. Revenue-based industries like education and healthcare also tend to have high turnover rates, with more than half of all jobs in the education sector experiencing high turnover rates, based on a study published in 2018.  Other industries that are associated with high turnover rates include retail, manufacturing, and the food service industry, and healthcare jobs in particular are designed to be short-lived, averaging less than three years.

response_0.content: Tell the history of Tarot Cards.

Tarot cards are one of the most well known methods of so-called “readings,” and they’re actually quite old. Many people believe the roots of the Tarot extend back to the 15th century or so, though there’s no strong evidence for this. An alternative theory is that they originated in medieval China, which again is largely undocumented and uncertain. The widespread popularity of Tarot over the last couple decades has made the exact history quite difficult to determine with any certainty.
What was the purpose of tarot cards in the 15th century?

Self-described “intuitive experts” such as vampires and diviners, often using tarot card readings, were common in the early 15th century. These experts were hired by people to supposedly help answer difficult questions or offer guidance. Documented court records reveal that it was common for respected society leaders to regularly consult with these types of “intuitive experts.” It’s unclear whether or not people had a realistic baseline belief in tarot abilities, or if these readings were primarily taken in a light-hearted, non-serious way.
What were the cards based off of?

The tarot is actually made up of 78 cards, which are divided into four suits of 14 cards each – wands, swords, cups, and pentacles. Supposedly the original tarot imagery uses the Moon, Sun, Empress, and Emperor, and all of the suits are derived from the suits of Renaissance playing cards.
What religions use tarot cards?

Self-described “intuitive experts,” such as fortune tellers, often use the insights gained from card decks to offer guidance to people in need of assistance with numerous topics, including love, relationships, and career. There appears to be no evidence of any specific religious or cultural group having especially strong roots in the use of tarot. However, Tarot has attracted an eclectic range of users for more than a few hundred years, making it difficult to trace any particular culture as its source.

Let me see if I can find some relevant sources on the internet.  I think I found one:

The term "statute of limitations" refers to a civil law doctrine that holds that after a certain period of time, the government cannot prosecute a crime. Statutes of limitations are not a constitutional provision, but are generally established by legislation in the jurisdiction where the crime took place. They act as a defense, providing individuals with protection from unwarranted prosecution, and giving their victims the opportunity to get on with their lives. Generally, a statute of limitations is a procedural rule intended to limit the time during which certain legal proceedings can be taken to remedy a wrong. The statute of limitations is commonly said to be a defense to a lawsuit, but in reality it is a defense to prosecution. The statute of limitations is a sort of statute of repose: it protects against stale claims.

response_0.content: How come my stereo doesn't work?

Your stereo probably doesn’t work because there is a problem with the amplifier or speakers.  To troubleshoot the issue, you can try adjusting the volume and speakers, and also make sure that all the wires are plugged in properly.  If you still have trouble, you may need to take your stereo to a repair shop for expert assistance.

I can't really afford to take it to get repaired or to buy a new one, so I was hoping to be able to figure out what was wrong and fixit myself. The wires all appear to be connected right and it powers on, but it makes no sound.

It’s hard for me to say for sure without knowing more about your stereo, but the main components are likely an amplifier, which converts the electrical signal to one that the speakers can output, and the speakers themselves, which convert the electrical signal back to sound waves that you can hear.  You can try turning your stereo on and see if it makes any sound or any beeps when it starts up.  Also, there is a master volume control that you may have accidentally muted.  It is usually located on the back of your stereo.  Try adjusting it and see if it makes any difference.  You can also try taking a flashlight and using it to look inside the stereo.  You may see a little diode lighting up in the speakers.  If you can see the diode lighting up, the speakers should work.

If the speakers are working, you should be able to hear sound through the headphones, but if the speakers are not working, you will only hear static.  You can also try unplugging the speakers and plugging them back in to see if that solves the issue.  If it does, then the speakers may have a problem with their electrical connections.  You can also try taking a screwdriver and gently prying open the stereo and looking for the diode.  If you see the diode, then the speakers are working, but if there is no diode inside the stereo then the speakers may not be working.

If you’re specifically concerned about hair loss symptoms, you might consider seeking advice and treatment from a physician regarding existing medical treatments which can assist in managing these.

A tornado is a storm involving rapidly-rotating wind whirling around in a funnel shape, usually associated with thunderclouds and very heavy rainfall.  The wind has extremely strong circulation and tracks from thunderstorm clouds down to the ground.  For significant tornadoes, the wind in the funnel can range from 40 to 200 miles per hour, and some very powerful tornadoes can even cause damage out to a few dozen miles away from the funnel.

Upside down tornadoes are often associated with rear flank downdrafts, which can increase the vertical development and formation of tornadoes in vortex storms.

Here are several great recipes for preparing duck breast:
What's a method for Oven Roasted Duck?

Here is a basic method for oven-roasted duck:

1. Bring a large oven-safe pan with about 1/4 inch of water to a simmer over medium heat.  Add duck breast, fat-side down, and poach over low heat.

2. When water is gently simmering and has just covered the duck, cover the pan and turn off the heat.  Let the duck poach in the covered pan until the skin is dark and crisp, but the breast meat is still pink, about 10 to 20 minutes. Check doneness early or later as preferred; pinkness indicates that the breast is still raw in the center.

3. Remove the duck breast from the pan and let rest for 10 minutes.  For crispy skin, score the skin with medium-deep slits, cover in salt-pepper mixture, and roast in a 450-degree oven for 12 to 15 minutes.  Serve garnished with fruit and greens.

response_0.content: How do car transmissions work?

Did you mean to type “Cars” instead of “Car”? 
You can think of it like this:
How do different gears work inside of the car's transmission?
Each gear moves a piston that pushes against the engine, and uses the energy of that push to rotate the wheels and cause the car to move.
Why do some transmissions have more gears than others?

Some transmissions have higher numbers of gears, and some don't.  More gears are helpful for more complicated situations.  For example, imagine you were trying to drive up a steep hill.  If your car only had three gears, then when you tried to move up the hill you would have to accelerate the engine slowly, which uses a lot of fuel, and causes the car to shake.  If your car had five gears, you could choose a gear that is low enough to just get you started, then shift into a higher gear that you could stay in for a while until you were at the top of the hill.

response_1.content: How do car transmissions work?

Did you mean to type “Cars” instead of “Car”? 
You can think of it like this:
How do different gears work inside of the car's transmission?
Each gear moves a piston that pushes against the engine, and uses the energy of that push to rotate the wheels and cause the car to move.
Why do some transmissions have more gears than others?

For this reason, and for safety.  One of the challenges in building a car transmission is that it has to be very robust.  If there’s too much force from the engine, the transmission can break.  One solution to this problem is to add more gears.  This is good because then each gear is only doing a portion of the work of the whole engine, and the total force across all of the gears is more spread out.  More gear also means that the car can run at lower speeds without over-driving the engine and breaking something.

response_0.content: I found a lot of gold dollar coins from the early 2000's in my moms house. Why were they discontinued?

The US gold dollar coin was briefly produced in the early part of the 2000's, and then discontinued by the federal government in 2004.  During the Middle Ages and Renaissance, distinguished american citizens and gold mining and trading companies had often produced private gold coins, which circulated independently of the official US currency at the time.  In the 1920's the US government briefly resumed the production of gold coins for circulation as currency, producing gold dollars and gold eagles.  The gold eagle series was continued throughout the 20th century and is still ongoing today, though only for bullion purposes.  In the early 2000's, another new gold dollar series was produced.  However, due to the significant cost and logistical burden of minting such coins, the series was discontinued after just a few years.
Why are they so hard to make compared to all the other coins?

Historically, the production of gold coins has been much more difficult and expensive than more common base metals such as copper or nickel, which are used more commonly.  The cost of production, minting, and distribution of gold coins is high because a great deal of effort is required to mine gold and refine it into pure gold bullion, and to then produce coins from this refined gold ore.  Gold is much softer and less durable than other types of metal currency and is also vulnerable to loss of value through wear over time.  The large burden of costs and security precautions associated with gold coins has meant that more common base metal
coins have historically been the norm for widespread and widely-used forms of standardized money.
I see. So since the government discontinued these gold dollars in 2004. would it be smart for me to hold on to them for investment purposes? Could they be worth something down the line?

Gold is often considered a valuable long-term investment due to its characteristically stable value over the long term.  However, since the discontinuation of the US gold dollar series in 2004, these coins generally do not have any additional monetary or historical value above and beyond their intrinsic bullion value as gold.  Historically valuable gold coins often have uniquely identifiable features and often possess considerable artistic or numismatic value as well, which would add to their overall value above and beyond their bullion price.  However, the gold dollar series minted in the 2000's does not have any particularly notable or collectible features, and have thus not developed any significant numismatic value.

It’s usually a series of behaviors that might look strange.  For example, the animal might be confused or even anxious, it might feel aggressive and attack other animals or people, or it might even attack itself, especially if it’s an animal that isn’t usually aggressive.
Is there anything else that I might be able to notice?

You might notice things in the animal’s behavior, like drooling, or eye flicking, or stumbling, or tail-holding, or unusual staring. Or the animal might look sick, and have other health issues besides the rabies.
Should I contact someone if I suspect an animal that I see might have rabies?

If you suspect the animal has rabies, you should contact the animal’s owner, and also some animal control or other local authority, like the fire department or a local animal control officer, so that they can arrange for a proper veterinarian check. The veterinarian will then be able to make a diagnosis and provide medical treatment, if necessary.

response_0.content: What is a CVT? Is it considered a type of automatic transmission, or a different transmission itself?

A continuous variable transmission, or CVT, is a type of transmission used in certain vehicles, such as hybrid cars. It is similar in some ways to a normal automatic transmission, but it has an infinite number of gear ratios rather than fixed ratios. CVTs were originally designed to be used with heavy farm machinery, for instance tractors or off-road vehicles, and now they’re also used in cars. In a CVT, a continuously variable ratio is used to vary the gear ratio between the engine and the driven wheels. This means that at any given time, the speed of the engine can be much different from the speed of the wheels, so there isn’t the same type of correlation between speed and gear as in an automatic transmission. Also, in an automatic transmission, it’s always possible to change the gear ratios by changing the speed of the engine, whereas in a CVT, it’s not. CVTs are not very common at the moment, although they’re popular in Europe and they’re often used as an option in hybrid cars.
Interesting. So like ATs, CVT don't require shifting gears, correct?

That’s correct. Some people say CVTs are better than ATs because you don’t have to shift gears, which can be annoying in automatic transmissions and which can reduce the lifetime of the transmission. Also, in automatic transmissions, the change in torque requires a delay in order to build up pressure in the clutch, which is not the case with a CVT. But you can also say that having a conventional automatic transmission has the advantages of quick and easy shifting and also the option of using the lower gears for more torque at higher speeds. Of course, if you use a high gear in a manual transmission car, that reduces fuel efficiency, so it’s complicated!

response_0.content: Is the sugar in fruit better for you than table sugar?

Yes, fruit contains all the vitamins and minerals in the fruit itself, as well as in the sugars and other nutrients from the fruit.  The sugars, if eaten with the fruit, would help you absorb these nutrients.  In contrast, table sugar is simply a concentrated source of calories, which is also bad for you.

response_1.content: Is the sugar in fruit better for you than table sugar?

The sugar in fruit and table sugar are chemically the same, but your body breaks them down into the same molecules of glucose when you consume them. The main difference between the sugar in fruit and table sugar is that table sugar is very concentrated. Many fruits have only a small amount of sugar, and the rest is water and other components. In contrast, table sugar is pure sugar, with no water or other components. So if you eat table sugar, you eat much less water but still end up eating a lot of sugar, whereas when you eat fruit, you eat a lot of sugar but still end up eating a lot of water and other components.

One of the best exercises to build the biceps, if your goal is to build muscle and increase strength, is the dumbbell bicep curl.  To do a bicep curl, you’ll hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards, and then lift the dumbbells, which will stretch your biceps muscle, up to your chest level, before slowly lowering back down.  When you lower the dumbbells down, they should end up positioned a little bit higher than when you raised them up.  You can add weight to the dumbbells by attaching plates, and the plates can then be used to increase your arm’s strength.  If you prefer a machine, you can use a hydraulic curl machine.  These are typically shaped like an upside-down letter L and you’ll do the same motion as with dumbbells, except that the weight is attached to the machine.  Some people find this exercise very painful when they start out, but it can be very helpful to exercise around your pain tolerance.  If you want to build up your biceps even more, you can try pulldowns, which involve grabbing a bar with weights on either end of the bar and pulling downwards, then extending your arms above your head, but this requires a lot of strength and can take years to develop, so it’s best to practice with weights in the range you’re comfortable with.

response_0.content: Why is fast fashion so detrimental to the environment?

Fast fashion generally refers to the mass production of clothing in a short supply chain, often within a single season, and aiming for very rapid product turnover and obsolescence.  This factory model of apparel production is extremely detrimental to the environment, as it relies on the mass exploitation of both natural resources and labor.  Specifically, fast fashion exerts intense pressures on forests due to the demand for both raw materials for fabrics, and wood pulp resources for disposable packaging.  This production also results in dangerous and toxic pollutants produced during the manufacturing process, such as pesticides, plastics, and toxic chemical dyes.  In addition, the extremely rapid production schedule for new product lines often results in significant amounts of waste being produced, as well as a need for excessive amounts of auxiliary resources such as fuel for transportation.  Finally, the extremely exploitative nature of the labor system used in fast fashion production also has many problematic human impacts, with egregious and harmful working conditions prevailing in many factories in the Global South.  The reliance on a centralized and monopolized supply chain for apparel production also results in the heavy concentration of economic and political power in the hands of a relatively small number of corporate actors -- further exacerbating exploitative labor conditions and exacerbating environmental pressures.
I thought a lot of fast fashion was made from synthetic fabric? Does that affect its environmental footprint?

Fast fashion production often relies on a high proportion of synthetic materials in apparel production, especially for garments with short lifespans.  However, these synthetic materials have an equally wasteful and destructive environmental footprint as the exploitation of natural resources.  Synthetic materials are derived from petrochemicals and other natural resources, and their production creates the same kinds of pollution issues as those associated with the production of natural textiles.  In addition, the reliance on synthetic materials creates many more waste byproducts, as the fabrics will certainly quickly break down or become obsolete, creating further waste streams.  Furthermore, the industry growth trend towards hyper-fast fashion cycles creates a pervasive and chronic need for the mass disposal of apparel -- resulting in an ever expanding stream of synthetic waste throughout the supply chain.
I've heard of the term "slow fashion movement" what does that mean?

The slow fashion movement refers to a shift in the consumption patterns for apparel towards a reprioritization of traditional manufacturing methods, materials, and production cycles.  Rather than simply adopting the mass production and disposable mentality of fast fashion models of apparel production, the slow fashion movement aims to create a more sustainable apparel model that prioritizes higher quality production and responsible environmental practices.  This shift in production mentality creates a number of notable benefits for the environment and for workers.  By prioritizing the use of natural materials and production systems, the slow fashion movement promotes more socially and environmentally responsible practices in apparel production.  Slow fashion aims to create economically viable production systems that rely on smaller, more localized apparel value chains, and that prioritize higher quality products with longer lifecycles, as well as reduced waste streams throughout the supply chain.  It also emphasizes the use of ethical practices and fair labor standards throughout the apparel industry, including higher wages for workers.  Overall, the slow fashion movement seeks to produce a more sustainable and socially responsible apparel industry, with a cleaner and more stable environmental footprint, as well as positive impacts on the livelihoods of workers in apparel production.
I suppose to participate in the slow fashion movement, we have to change our mindsets and get away from materialism. That seems really difficult when there are so many pretty things in the world!

Absolutely!  The shift to a sustainable and responsible approach to apparel production is definitely a challenging endeavor, and requires a major reorientation of consumer behavior and values.  However, this transition is absolutely possible -- and certainly necessary to address the increasing scale and severity of the environmental and social problems inherent in today's fast fashion industry.  There are also many positive and empowering benefits associated with adopting a responsible and sustainable approach to apparel consumption.  In particular, adopting a slower and more responsible approach to apparel consumption promotes a more mindful and conscientious approach to one's material possessions, as apparel becomes something that is produced and valued more as a precious object, and less as a disposable commodity.   In addition, a more mindful and sustainable approach to apparel consumption necessitates a more critical appreciation and evaluation of the true value behind clothing.  This results in a dramatic shift in the nature of one's fashion consumption towards greater appreciation and care for clothing overall, as well as a deeper connection to more ethical and sustainable apparel producers.  Furthermore, this shift promotes and facilitates a much greater involvement of individual consumers in the broader apparel value chain, empowering greater transparency, accountability, and economic opportunity within the sector and for laborers as well.

So let's say the entire planet moves away from fast fashion, towards sustainable options. Will there be detrimental consequences for those who rely on fast fashion for work in the Global South? I know a lot of fashion companies exploit their workers, but how does "ending" fast fashion benefit them?

The adoption of a more sustainable and responsible approach to apparel production will have a significant positive impact on society and the environment overall.  However, it is also true that such a transition will entail certain disruptive and difficult transitions for many current industries and laborers.  Specifically, the transition away from fast fashion will entail a significant loss of jobs in the apparel sector.  However, such job losses are inevitable, as the current apparel industry model of fast fashion is ultimately unsustainable and detrimental to workers and society as a whole.  In challenging times of employment uncertainty and economic restructuring, it is vitally important that governments play a central role in creating and developing sustainable and responsible job opportunities within the apparel sector.  The adoption of best practices throughout the apparel industry will help ameliorate the negative impacts and disruptions associated with this transition.  The ultimate result of this shift will also be a more sustainable and responsible apparel industry, and a more prosperous and stable future for many workers globally.

Deeply religious and spiritual individuals have often claimed to have prophetic abilities or experiences. According to these beliefs, prophecy is a divine or supernatural ability granted by a deity, deities, or spirit beings to certain privileged human beings. People express such abilities through visions, dreams, divination, prayer, meditation, or messages given to others. They believe that prophecy enables a person to receive a message from a deity or other spiritual source, another person, or a dead ancestor, for the purpose of sharing a divine message or foretelling future events. 

These kinds of beliefs are often presented in religious texts or spiritual philosophies, including various religions, as well as in more modern new-age spirituality. There is no rhyme or reason to how prophetic abilities are claimed to manifest, and they are generally conceptualized as reflecting some form of divine knowledge or foreknowledge of future events.    

We currently have little direct scientific evidence for any real power of prophetic ability. response_0.content: How does a pacemaker help the function of the heart?

A pacemaker is a small electronic device implanted under the skin with an electrode attached to the heart to help control the rate and rhythm of the heartbeat. The pacemaker senses when the heartbeat is slow or irregular and sends electrical impulses to the heart at a pre-defined safe and healthy rate, normalizing the heart beat.

response_1.content: How does a pacemaker help the function of the heart?

A pacemaker is a medical device implanted in the chest which stimulates the heart to beat at a normal rhythm, helping the heart to pump and circulate blood more efficiently and effectively. Pacemakers are generally implanted with catheters by a practitioner in a cardiac catheterization or angiography procedure, or in rare cases with open chest surgery. Pacemaker systems usually consist of a pulse generator and set of leads, one end of which is sutured to the heart (lead to the right atrium, right ventricle, right-side of the chest, or the right coronary sinus), and the other end which is connected to the pacemaker. Pacemakers also can be used as a lifesaving measure for patients with heart failure, or at risk of permanent damage from their heart not functioning properly.

response_0.content: Would raising the federal minimum wage increase the cost of goods? I know that is one reason some are opposed to raising it.

In a very broad sense, yes. It’s hard to be entirely precise, since different economists might define “raising the minimum wage” differently. It’s probably best to understand it as a trade-off: if minimum wage increases, then businesses will have less money to work with, and so may need to increase prices.
I see. So does this mean businesses would also likely fire people due to having to pay more?

That’s a tough question, and one for which economists have some differing views. Some economists say that businesses will not fire employees to compensate for minimum wage increases, instead increasing prices and reducing profits. Other economists say businesses will be forced to lay off some employees to compensate for minimum wage increases. And some economists say businesses will not need to lay off employees, but may reduce the number of hours worked, though not the number of employees, in response to a minimum wage increase.

response_1.content: Would raising the federal minimum wage increase the cost of goods? I know that is one reason some are opposed to raising it.

In a very broad sense, yes. It’s hard to be entirely precise, since different economists might define “raising the minimum wage” differently. It’s probably best to understand it as a trade-off: if minimum wage increases, then businesses will have less money to work with, and so may need to increase prices.
I see. So does this mean businesses would also likely fire people due to having to pay more?

That’s a bit more complicated.  In general, raising the minimum wage would most probably increase the demand for labor, which would mean there would be more labor available at the same time that some businesses would have less money.  I think it would depend on where the cost of living was higher, and where the labor demand was higher.  If you can imagine two places that are the same distance apart, but one is cheaper, and one is more expensive, and they both had the same minimum wage - that would look a bit like a seesaw, with businesses that paid the higher minimum wage needing to offer lower salaries, but people who were in demand for their skills getting paid higher than the minimum wage.

response_0.content: How many times should you work out a week?

That’s a really interesting question.  In terms of exercise, there are several ways to answer it.  Do you want to know the minimum amount of exercise that you should be doing, or the ideal amount of exercise, or what you should do in order to stay healthy?  Or maybe you want to know how many times you should exercise per week?  Each of these are questions that are answered differently, because exercise is so complicated.
What do people generally do?

Well, the average adult probably exercises five to six days a week, and most people try to work out about a half an hour each day.  You could also think about it as 2-3 hours of moderate activity per week.  People with jobs often don’t have the time to fit in that much exercise each day.

response_1.content: How many times should you work out a week?

That’s a really interesting question.  In terms of exercise, there are several ways to answer it.  Do you want to know the minimum amount of exercise that you should be doing, or the ideal amount of exercise, or what you should do in order to stay healthy?  Or maybe you want to know how many times you should exercise per week?  Each of these are questions that are answered differently, because exercise is so complicated.
What do people generally do?

In terms of minimum requirements, there is a commonly referenced exercise guideline, called the “physical activity guidelines for Americans”.  This is a document created by the US Centers for Disease Control and Prevention.  It’s a national recommendation for all healthy people over the age of five, to help prevent chronic disease, particularly cardiovascular disease and type 2 diabetes.  The guidelines specify the minimum amount of moderate or vigorous physical activity, spread over the week, that healthy individuals should get.

response_0.content: Can you give me strategies for removing clutter from my house?

Sure! Clutter can be difficult to deal with, but there are some helpful steps you can take to organize the mess. To begin, make a list of the things you would like to get rid of, then begin going through objects one by one. If you aren’t sure whether to keep an object, imagine yourself without it for awhile -- if you don’t miss it, you probably don’t need it! After you’ve gone through everything on your list, take a look around your house, and you may notice pieces of clutter you overlooked before. Bingo can be a great game for kids! Have her play a lot, and teach her that each round has a “caller” who announces the random number that corresponds to the pattern of numbers in the bingo card. If she gets a match, she calls out the word “bingo” to tell everyone. If no one has bingo yet, she marks her card and moves on to the next round. Eventually someone will get all the numbers in a row and yell out “bingo” and everyone wins!
What happens if she yells out "bingo" but doesn't have a match?

If your daughter yells out "bingo" but doesn't have a match, it will be interesting for the kids to consider what might happen if everyone tries to bingo. This can be a fun activity to discuss the importance of rules in games, and to discuss how frustration can happen when everyone tries to have their own way.

response_0.content: What's the purpose of the interstate highway system?

The interstate highway system is an extensive network of highways built primarily in the United States.  These roads are intended to connect adjacent states and major cities by providing high-speed roadways to facilitate the transport of people and goods.  They are also frequently used as thoroughfares for scenic travel and recreational purposes.  The system was created in 1956, and it currently consists of over 47,000 miles of highway.
What system did our roads use prior to 1956?

Before 1956, there was an existing network of state, county, and other local roads that provided far less interstate coordination.  In many cases, this resulted in limited direct roads between the states and across the country.  Americans were especially interested in improving the country’s infrastructure after World War II, which led to a major push to develop and implement new road systems across the country.  In fact, Americans originally planned to build a network of just over 4,000 miles of highway, but the eventual completion of this plan in 1956 resulted in the currently extensive system.
Why did the country only plan on 4000 miles of highway? The US has always been a big plot of land, I'm surprised they only envisioned 4000 miles.

Initially, the plan to build a new highway system was intended solely to connect large and important cities that were part of the national road system.  It began as a fairly limited project of about 4,000 miles of interstate road, connecting the major cities in the country.  During the entire process, though, the view of the proposed roads expanded significantly, and Americans began to envision a far wider network of interstate highways that would more extensively connect corners of the country.  Ultimately, this led to a substantial construction plan that significantly impacted the history of the United States in terms of transportation.  By 1956, when this plan had completed, Americans had built the extensive interstate network they envisioned previously.

response_0.content: How do I get into cryptocurrency?

Ah excellent question!  There are a myriad of different types of cryptocurrencies out there, and the context and purpose of each varies greatly.  In general though, cryptocurrencies are based on the principles of cryptographic encryption, and are designed to be anonymous, secure, and fast global transactions.  There are a wide variety of different cryptocurrencies out there, with Bitcoin being the most well known and established.  Bitcoin is designed as a decentralized global payment system without any central governing authority, and is largely used for speculative trading these days rather than as a regular payment method.  Other notable cryptocurrencies include Ethereum, Monero, and Dogecoin.  If you are interested in easily getting started with cryptocurrency trading, both Coinbase and Gemini are excellent platforms for this.  If you are interested in understanding the underlying principles and technologies behind cryptocurrency, the excellent book “Bitcoin and Cryptocurrency Technologies” by Ernest Ehrsam provides a great introduction.  I hope this helps!  Best of luck with your cryptocurrency trading endeavors!
Do I connect my bank with the crypto platform if I want to start buying cryptocurrency?

Yes that is definitely the simplest way to begin buying cryptocurrency.  Just connect your bank account with the crypto platform you choose, and then you can deposits funds and start buying cryptocurrency.  Make sure you choose a reputable and secure platform though, as there have been several high profile crypto platform hacks in recent years.  Some excellent platforms to consider are Coinbase and Gemini, which both have extensive user security measures and high reputations.  Also be sure to carefully review the platform terms and conditions, as some platforms charge fees or restrict transactions in various ways which you should be aware of before signing up.
And is the wallet only accessible on my phone or can I access it on a laptop or desktop computer?

Excellent question!  Most mobile wallets (such as the Coinbase iOS or Android app) only allow transactions from the mobile app itself, but many desktop wallets will allow you to transfer funds from a mobile wallet to your desktop wallet, or from your desktop wallet to other desktop wallets or exchanges.  The most popular desktop wallet is Blockchain.info, which is available for both Apple and Android devices, and allows you to easily perform all types of cryptocurrency transactions.

response_0.content: Can you live with only one kidney

The function of the kidney is to remove urea and other waste products from the bloodstream.  We’re really good at this, and it’s easy to keep one kidney functioning even with both kidneys gone.  Of course, people who have only one kidney can experience serious health issues if the remaining kidney doesn’t function well.  That said, a good kidney transplant can correct this.
That's very interesting

In some sense, the kidney is a backup organ, since the liver can also handle the job, in particular by using proteins called “urea transporters” to pull urea out of the blood.  The question of why we have two kidneys instead of one is a classic biological question that we still don’t have a good answer for.  But that’s actually not such a bad thing, since it’s nice to know that we still have important questions left to ask.  In the meantime, don’t worry about this, but get in touch with your doctor if you have any concerns about your kidneys.

response_0.content: can you explain the rock cycle
Sure!  The rock cycle is the process of all rocks naturally being broken down into smaller rocks over time.
How does the rock cycle work step by step?

The basic parts of the rock cycle are the rock cycle for igneous rocks, and the rock cycle for sedimentary rocks.  I'll explain each step of the rock cycle, starting with igneous rocks.  It begins with magma that comes from deep in the Earth.  This magma is hot and it rises up through the Earth, and it cools and hardens into rocks.  Then the rocks can be broken up by physical forces like weathering, or the rocks can be melted by heat from volcanoes, which we call lava.  Then the liquid rock can form rocks again as it cools.

response_1.content: can you explain the rock cycle
Sure!  The rock cycle is the process of all rocks naturally being broken down into smaller rocks over time.
How does the rock cycle work step by step?

First, on the Earth, the crust is moving along, sometimes very slowly, and it bumps into another rock.  This makes the rock move, and this could happen over and over again.  As the rock moves, it slowly erodes away over time, this is called weathering.  As the rock erodes, it breaks down into smaller pieces, which are also breaking down further.  This happens through chemical weathering, which involves wet weather turning rock into mud.  Dry weather causes rock to break down through wind and weather.  Both processes make smaller pieces that can fall and break down further.

If you are wanting to find turtles that are already small enough to keep in the house, you could also look for aquatic or mini tortoises. response_0.content: What are the symptoms of low potassium?

There are several different types of potassium deficiency, but low potassium can cause fatigue, insomnia, muscle weakness, and shortness of breath.  Low potassium also causes poor memory and concentration, tingling sensations in the hands and feet, and abnormal heart rhythms.
Can the abnormal heart rhythms be dangerous?

Yes, the most serious symptoms of potassium deficiency include an irregular heartbeat called torsades de pointes.  This can cause shock or even sudden death.  As your symptoms worsen, you might be more likely to experience torsades de pointes, and it is important to seek medical attention immediately if you experience any of the symptoms.

response_1.content: What are the symptoms of low potassium?

There are several different types of potassium deficiency, but low potassium can cause fatigue, insomnia, muscle weakness, and shortness of breath.  Low potassium also causes poor memory and concentration, tingling sensations in the hands and feet, and abnormal heart rhythms.
Can the abnormal heart rhythms be dangerous?

Yes, it can sometimes lead to sudden cardiac death.  However, it’s important to note that your doctor will likely recommend potassium supplementation for you, which would negate most of these symptoms.  And even though there’s a risk of sudden death, it’s low.  The US government’s Scientific Committee on Herbal Medicines and Medical Plants (SCHMP) said in 2013 that the risk of death from natural potassium deficiency is between 1 in 10,000 and 1 in 100,000 over the entire population.

response_0.content: What are some healthy drinks for my diabetic aunt?
What kind of diabetes does your aunt have?
Type 2 diabetes.

Type 2 diabetes is the kind where the body doesn’t make enough insulin.  Some drinks are better for controlling blood sugar levels than others.  If she’s drinking to manage diabetes, it’s important to ask about a drink’s glycemic index, which measures how rapidly it will spike your blood sugar.  Water, for example, has no impact on blood sugar, and so can be drunk safely regardless of one’s diet.

response_1.content: What are some healthy drinks for my diabetic aunt?
What kind of diabetes does your aunt have?
Type 2 diabetes.

Drinking, for people with Type 2 diabetes, usually isn’t a concern because the calories from a drink are negligible compared to the calories from food. It’s mainly important to watch what she eats to make sure she’s eating a healthy diet.

Similarly, people with black hair are stereotyded as being passionate or tough, people with red hair are stereotyded as being both temperamental and also as being too rebellious, etc.
So it is probably not true then?

Yes, some stereotypes are true, some are not.  I would say the stereotype that blonde people are dumb is probably not true.  Some blonde people are smart, some are not, but the stereotype of blonde people as being dumb is probably not accurate.

response_0.content: What is the most recycled material in the world today?

I actually don’t know, and I can see how this might be hard to know since I can’t measure whether any single item is more recycled than others. But I can see the problem of knowing the answer to this question from a couple of different points of view.  If we’re going to assess this question quantitatively, we have to account for what the definition of “recycled” is.  Are we talking about recycling material by putting it back into industrial production, or do we consider raw materials like scrap iron to be recycled too?
Do they recycle asphalt?

Well, if we consider industrial production, then no.  Asphalt is a crude material that can be found naturally, so it would count as a raw material rather than a recycled one.  But some countries do collect asphalt from roads, and a company in Australia recycles petroleum residues and produces refined asphalt.  If we count this as recycling, then asphalt is one of the most recycled materials.  But if we’re looking at recycling strictly as a material that’s returned to industrial production, asphalt doesn’t get a top spot.

If we’re going to assess this question quantitatively, we have to account for what the definition of “recycled” is.  Are we talking about recycling material by putting it back into industrial production, or do we consider raw materials like scrap iron to be recycled too?
Do they recycle asphalt?

Asphalt is an interesting material, because it’s not really a material but a mixture of several different components.  When you recycle asphalt, it’s often just the form of the mixture that you’re recycling.  Often it’s just water that’s recycled, as it’s added to asphalt to replenish the material’s bonding properties, then it’s driven off in a separate step.  Of course, you could recycle the individual components too.  I think there are all sorts of different answers to this question.
